content: A person below the age of majority may gain adult rights through a legal process called emancipation. This process allows a minor to become legally independent from their parents or guardians, enabling them to make decisions regarding their own life and assume adult responsibilities.
raw_content: A person below the age of majority may gain adult rights through a legal process called emancipation. This process allows a minor to become legally independent from their parents or guardians, enabling them to make decisions regarding their own life and assume adult responsibilities.
